productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Red Mickeys Scrap Book Kidswear
description: CompositionRound neck red t-shirt in 100% cotton, with mickey chest print and neck detail in blueFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking and remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryLet the naughty smile of your little boy stand out loud and clear with this summery mickey t-shirt from disney. Made of pure cotton fabric, this t-shirt will keep your little boy dry and comfortable while he runs around and enjoys an energetic game with his friends. Add on a pair of comfortable footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little boy into a prince.
